item.title: Digital Image Restoration Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Image Restoration Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restorefiles
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Image Restoration Software
(Utilities)
Digital image restoration tool rescues lost photographs from smart media, multimedia cards or any other type of removable digital media cards. If you have accidentally deleted your important snaps including special moment pictures such as wedding anniversary images, birthday party photos and snapshots of parent, friends or family. You can easily restore your lost pictures by the use of digital photograph recovery software. Compact flash image rescue application can easily be installed on Windows Operating System based hard disk including windows11, windows10, windows8 no technical skills to operate. Undelete service for photo retrieval recovers lost pictures just in few minutes of time and saves the recovered images to specified location of drive for future reference. Non-destructive photo recovery utility supports USB media drives including zip drive, thumbnail drive, pen drive, super flash media card, multimedia memory card of all major brands which includes Sony, Nikon, Kodak, Samsung, Kingston, Transcend, SanDisk etc. Digital camera photograph restoration tool is user friendly software which provides interactive Graphical User Interface (GUI) and help manuals for technical and non-technical users. Download digital images retrieval application undelete damaged pictures lost due to virus attack, software hardware malfunction, power failure or improper usage. Features:* Software is simple and easy to use.* Restores lost photographs from corrupted hard disk drive or other digital storage media.* Utility provides thumbnail preview of deleted pictures before actual recovery.* Recovers lost data due to overwritten, logical corruption of MBR DBR MFT boot records.* Supports all major digital camera brands including Sony, Nikon, Kodak, Samsung, Kingston, Transcend, SanDisk etc.

[read more]
item.description:
Digital Image Restoration Software
(Utilities)
Digital image restoration tool rescues lost photographs from smart media, multimedia cards or any other type of removable digital media cards. If you have accidentally deleted your important snaps including special moment pictures such as wedding anniversary images, birthday party photos and snapshots of parent, friends or family. You can easily restore your lost pictures by the use of digital photograph recovery software. Compact flash image rescue application can easily be installed on Windows Operating System based hard disk including windows11, windows10, windows8 no technical skills to operate. Undelete service for photo retrieval recovers lost pictures just in few minutes of time and saves the recovered images to specified location of drive for future reference. Non-destructive photo recovery utility supports USB media drives including zip drive, thumbnail drive, pen drive, super flash media card, multimedia memory card of all major brands which includes Sony, Nikon, Kodak, Samsung, Kingston, Transcend, SanDisk etc. Digital camera photograph restoration tool is user friendly software which provides interactive Graphical User Interface (GUI) and help manuals for technical and non-technical users. Download digital images retrieval application undelete damaged pictures lost due to virus attack, software hardware malfunction, power failure or improper usage. Features:* Software is simple and easy to use.* Restores lost photographs from corrupted hard disk drive or other digital storage media.* Utility provides thumbnail preview of deleted pictures before actual recovery.* Recovers lost data due to overwritten, logical corruption of MBR DBR MFT boot records.* Supports all major digital camera brands including Sony, Nikon, Kodak, Samsung, Kingston, Transcend, SanDisk etc.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Digital Image Restoration Software
(Utilities)
Digital image restoration tool rescues lost photographs from smart media, multimedia cards or any other type of removable digital media cards. If you have accidentally deleted your important snaps including special moment pictures such as wedding anniversary images, birthday party photos and snapshots of parent, friends or family. You can easily restore your lost pictures by the use of digital photograph recovery software. Compact flash image rescue application can easily be installed on Windows Operating System based hard disk including windows11, windows10, windows8 no technical skills to operate. Undelete service for photo retrieval recovers lost pictures just in few minutes of time and saves the recovered images to specified location of drive for future reference. Non-destructive photo recovery utility supports USB media drives including zip drive, thumbnail drive, pen drive, super flash media card, multimedia memory card of all major brands which includes Sony, Nikon, Kodak, Samsung, Kingston, Transcend, SanDisk etc. Digital camera photograph restoration tool is user friendly software which provides interactive Graphical User Interface (GUI) and help manuals for technical and non-technical users. Download digital images retrieval application undelete damaged pictures lost due to virus attack, software hardware malfunction, power failure or improper usage. Features:* Software is simple and easy to use.* Restores lost photographs from corrupted hard disk drive or other digital storage media.* Utility provides thumbnail preview of deleted pictures before actual recovery.* Recovers lost data due to overwritten, logical corruption of MBR DBR MFT boot records.* Supports all major digital camera brands including Sony, Nikon, Kodak, Samsung, Kingston, Transcend, SanDisk etc.

[read more]

item.title: Camera Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Camera Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Camera Recovery
(Utilities)
Camera recovery utility has capability to restore deleted images and pictures files that has been deleted due to virus infection on digital camera card. Card retrieval technique has capability to recover misplaced files and folders from SD card due to pulling out of memory card from digital camera while device is in loading process. Memory card recovery software provides simplified solution to retrieve missed audios and videos from corrupted digital camera. www.data-recovery-digital-camera.com provides enhanced and innovative technology which is capable to get beck omitted files and folders from MMC card due to improper use by humans. Camera recovery application is capable to revive and regain unreadable images and photos from digital camera card due to automatic shut down of device. Memory card retrieval software has capability to provide preview of deleted files and folders before retrieving them from formatted digital camera card. Digital card restoration application is capable to restore deleted audios and videos from software crashed memory card in simplified way. Picture restoration application provides user friendly GUI which provides step by step guidance to new user to regenerate their deleted photo without any technical or advanced knowledge. Features: *Camera recovery software is designed and developed by expert engineers to recover deleted files and folders from digital camera. *Card retrieval application provides fast restoring of erased files from various types of MMC card as compared to other recovery software. *Picture card restoration program has ability to regenerate corrupted images and pictures from virus infected memory cards. *Digital card recovery tool provides reliable option to remanufacture lost files from various branded camera cards like Nikon, Transcend etc. in less time.

[read more]
item.description:

(Utilities)
Camera recovery utility has capability to restore deleted images and pictures files that has been deleted due to virus infection on digital camera card. [read more]

item.title: DataVare MBOX To PST Converter [File Management]
item.itunes:title: DataVare MBOX To PST Converter [File Management]
item.itunes:author: datavare1
item.itunes:summary:
DataVare MBOX To PST Converter
(File Management)
With the well-known DataVare MBOX to PST Converter tool, users can successfully convert all MBOX files to PST format. More than 25 MBOX-based email clients are supported, including Thunderbird, PocoMail, Apple Mail, Eudora, SeaMonkey, and Opera Mail. Also, it operates with every version of Windows and Microsoft Outlook. All converting processes can be performed by MBOX to PST Converter without the need for additional tools. With this program, users can bulk export an endless number of MBOX files, including attachments. There are also free trial versions of the software available to test its functioning.

Key Features -

Export MBOX files in bulk or individually
Works with all versions of Outlook and Windows
No other software needs to be installed.
User-friendly and easy-to-use GUI
To ensure user pleasure, a free demo is also offered.
Manage the data structure and all email attributes.
A secure and efficient method to export data from MBOX into PST.

Visit Here - https://www.datavare.com/software/mbox-to-pst-converter-expert.html
[read more]

item.title: ToolsBaer OLM to PST Conversion [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: ToolsBaer OLM to PST Conversion [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: michaelgeorge
item.itunes:summary:
ToolsBaer OLM to PST Conversion
(Utilities)
The ToolsBaer OLM to PST Conversion tool has many features and is easy to use. With the program, users can quickly convert OLM to PST format without worrying about data loss or security issues. This program has an easy-to-use graphical user interface (GUI). Users with little knowledge of technology can benefit from the program because it is error-free and maintains the original folder structure and objects. Any sort of attachment or OLM file format can be converted with ease using the program. The transformed data can be saved by users on their chosen desktop area. It is possible to convert OLM files to PST files without the need for any software. Users can use the software's demo version to convert 10 OLM files to PST files at no cost. Microsoft Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, 8.1, 10, 11, and other versions are compatible with OLM to PST Conversion. Installing it is simple. The converted OLM file can be easily imported into any version of Microsoft Outlook, including versions 2003, 2007, 2010, 2013, 2016, 2019, and others.

[read more]

item.title: Sony Handycam Pictures Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Sony Handycam Pictures Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restorefiles
item.itunes:summary:
Sony Handycam Pictures Recovery
(Utilities)
Digital camera photo recovery application retrieves your all lost memorable digital images like family snaps, wedding anniversary albums or other occasional photographs deleted from handycam storage device. Sony handycam pictures restoration tool salvages corrupted data from different types of digital cameras including professional camera, point and shoot camera, digital video camera and compact digital camera available in different megapixels. Professional camera photos retrieval software recovers all different types of lost files, folders, snapshot, video clip and still photographs from inaccessible handycam devices. Digital camera files salvage tool restores data from formatted multimedia card. Digital video camera data restoration application retrieves erased files folders even if an error message like Drive Not Formatted or Drive Not Recognized is being displayed while accessing handycam device on your PC. Sony handycam pictures recovery utility backup missing data in their original format and provides facility to save at specified location on your PC hard disk. DSLR camera data retrieval software also restores deleted data due to memory card is removed improperly from digital camera while it is on. Novelty camera images restoration tool supports all branded digital cameras including Sony, Minolta, Canon, Olympus and Nikon D100 etc. Digital camera photo files rescue application is compatible with all windows OS including XP and Vista.Features:* Handycam pictures recovery software recovers lost images, audio, video clips, jpeg, mpeg and other file formats supported by digital camera.* Software supports all types of megapixel digital cameras like DSLR camera, professional camera and compact digital camera etc.* Digital camera image rescue tool recovers deleted files folders from both internal and external memory of your handycam storage device.* Sony handycam pictures retrieval utility restores missing data from all branded digital cameras.

[read more]

item.title: Reciprocal Links Checker Tool [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Reciprocal Links Checker Tool [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: restorefiles
item.itunes:summary:
Reciprocal Links Checker Tool
(Internet Apps)
Download reciprocal link checker application provides comprehensive solution for how to check for multiple backlinks at various publisher website simultaneously. Freeware reciprocal link checker utility provides facility to notify user through email in case of any weblink is removed from publisher website or web page cannot be found. Application generates report containing complete information about “total link present”, “total link absent”, “link found on”, “link not found on” in file format of TXT, HTML and CSV. Freeware backlink checker tool easily installable on windows 11, windows10, windows8, windows7 operating system based computer either laptop or desktop. Software provides interactive user friendly environment to make application easy in use without requirement of much technical knowledge. Utility helpful to check your website backlinks to improve page rank and popularity of website on various search engines like Google, Yahoo, MSN etc. Free MSN backlink checker program provides feature to monitor your direct links, java script links, inward links, back links on more than one publisher websites. Software provides inbuilt user help manual support for both expert and beginner user. Freeware backlink checker program has capability to watch multiple reciprocal links on various publisher website. Software supports both type of website http and secure http.Features:* Helpful for webmaster to manage reciprocal link at various partner website simultaneously.* Freeware reciprocal link checker application notify user by sending report through email at user specified email address.* Software generates report in format of HTML, TXT and comma separated values (CSV) files.* Backlink checker tool is easy to use and does not require much technical knowledge.

[read more]
item.description:
Reciprocal Links Checker Tool
(Internet Apps)
Download reciprocal link checker application provides comprehensive solution for how to check for multiple backlinks at various publisher website simultaneously. Freeware reciprocal link checker utility provides facility to notify user through email in case of any weblink is removed from publisher website or web page cannot be found. Application generates report containing complete information about “total link present”, “total link absent”, “link found on”, “link not found on” in file format of TXT, HTML and CSV. [read more]

item.title: Pics Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Pics Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Pics Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Simple to use Pics Recovery Software provides facility to restore erased, misplace crucial images, birthday photograph from inaccessible pen drive. Versatile Photo Recovery application gets back photograph, images pictures file in simple manner. Digital Pictures Data Recovery utility effectively revives mislaid picture graphic files from damage compact disk drive. Pics Recovery Software specially designed to salvage damaged anniversary photos, picture and snap shot in simple manner. Digital photo Recovery program restore misplaced all important photographs, images from damage external digital storage device in cost effective manner. Pics Recovery Software effectively salvage deleted images, snap and no need of technical knowledge for operating it. Simple to use Image Recovery application restore misplaced picture file due to hardware malfunctioning, power failure, human fault, formatted disk and human fault. Resourceful Digital Pics Recovery Software get back misplaced, wedding photograph, images, snap from storage media. Digital Pictures Recovery application quickly recoup file, pictures and support all brands of USB media like Sony, Toshiba, Samsung, hp, Pen and many other. Download Pics Recovery Software from www.data-recovery-digital-camera.com web site you can regain erased digital image in simple mouse clicks. Digital picture files revival application Recovery retrieves picture and supports all types of digital pictures format such as bitmap, jpeg, tiff, jpg, gif etc. Features: * Digital picture files recovery tool safely recuperates erased, deleted or damaged images, snap shot same as pervious conditions. * Pics Recovery Software supports all WWindows based operating system including Windows 11,Win 10,Win 8 and many other. * Photos rescue application restores all pictures and images from removable media in minimal time periods.* Reliable and easy Pics Recovery Software recovers photograph from External hard disk drive, Compact flash memory

[read more]

item.title: Convert MySQL to Microsoft SQL [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Convert MySQL to Microsoft SQL [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restorefiles
item.itunes:summary:
Convert MySQL to Microsoft SQL
(Utilities)
Migrate MySQL server database to MSSQL software provides easy and best migrating solution to transfer your whole database of MySQL to MSSQL database. MySQL to MSSQL database conversion utility has powerful converter quality that transfer data from MySQL to MSSQL server within seconds. Database migration software can convert one record, selected group record or entire database in one step only. MySQL to MSSQL database converter tool migrate certain tables, rows, column, fields, indexes, constraints values, null values, primary keys, foreign keys, default value, structure, unique keys, attributes, schema etc from MySQL database to MSSQL database. Database converter utility maintains data integrity and support Unicode architecture. Database migration application provides best user friendly graphical user interface (GUI) for end user so that there is no requirement of technical knowledge to install or operate this MySQL to MSSQL database migration tool. MySQL to MSSQL database converter freeware silently use command line parameters to convert database without user interaction.Features:* Freeware MySQL to MSSQL database migration tool provides complete solution to convert MySQL database to MSSQL server.* Freeware MySQL to MSSQL database converter is capable to execute with all windows based operating system like windows11, windows10, windows8, windows7.* MySQL to MSSQL database converter can easily create new record or overwrite on existing record within seconds.* Freeware database translator utility support all versions of MySQL data types to convert primary key, foreign keys and other necessary attributes and also supports to maintain data integrity, Unicode architecture and mixed constraints.

[read more]

item.title: Data Recovery for Mobile Phone [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Data Recovery for Mobile Phone [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Data Recovery for Mobile Phone
(Utilities)
Innovative software Data Recovery for Mobile Phone is fully capable to undelete completely removed data files from handheld devices without need of any expert guidance or technical assistance. Cell Phones Data Recovery program is integrated with advance technology and empowers people to regain wallpapers from mobile phone memory in time efficient manner.

[read more]
